title: Player Movement Abilities
description: Ever get tired of Minecraft's basic movement? This datapack is here to fix it!
body:
Adds some player movement abilities to give you more freedom to traverse the world. To enable: 
```
/tag (name) add NewMovement
```
Select one of the last 3 slots in the hotbar and crouch.
6 is Double Jump.
7 is Dash.
8 is BackDash.

**THANKS TO STEVELOCKS FOR ALL THE CODING HELP!**
**THANKS TO MAX_DAMAGE FOR ALL THE ARTISTRY!**
